steps.title: Dashboard mobile layout
steps.evidence: Initially FAILED: session sidebar 280px didn't auto-collapse, leaving 110px for content. Fixed in 6587fb1: default collapsed when innerWidth < 640. Re-verified: sidebar auto-collapses, main content fills width.

steps.title: Session chat mobile
steps.evidence: With sidebar auto-collapsed, chat area fills width. Metadata header (status, project, model, turns, cost, duration), message content, input with attach/submit all visible and usable.

steps.title: History page mobile
steps.evidence: History page renders well at 390px. Header, search input, status filter visible. Table has horizontal scroll. Pagination (38 sessions, page 1/2) visible.

steps.title: Sidebar navigation mobile
steps.evidence: Hamburger opens sheet dialog with Dashboard, Sessions, History, Settings links. Navigation between pages works.

steps.title: Session sidebar mobile
steps.evidence: Auto-collapsed at mobile width. Expand button available. Session dots visible as compact icons for quick switching.

fix.description: Default sidebarCollapsed to true when window.innerWidth < 640 and no localStorage preference stored.
